instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: M5: Accept admin transfer (pending admin only).

instructions.name: admin_fix_market_accrue
docs: Fix a market whose accrue state was never initialized. Admin only.

instructions.name: admin_pause
docs: Emergency pause/unpause. Admin only.

instructions.name: admin_set_fallback_oracle
docs: Set or remove fallback oracle on a market. Admin only.

instructions.name: admin_set_oracle_authority
docs: Set the default oracle authority (cranker pubkey) on Protocol. Admin only.

instructions.name: admin_update_market
docs: M4: Admin market update — update oracle, active status, trading fee.

instructions.name: admin_withdraw_sol
docs: H1 (R3): Withdraw accumulated SOL creation fees from protocol PDA.

instructions.name: cancel_trigger_order
docs: Cancel a trigger order.

instructions.name: claim_fees
docs: C7: Claim accumulated trading fees. Creator or protocol admin.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint (needed for transfer_checked — validated against market)

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close a position (fully or partially).

instructions.name: crank_funding
docs: Crank the funding rate. Permissionless.

instructions.name: create_market
docs: Create a new perpetual futures market. Permissionless — anyone can call.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint (e.g. USDC). Must be 6 decimals for Percolator math compatibility.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposit collateral into a market position.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint (needed for transfer_checked — validated against market)

instructions.name: execute_trigger_order
docs: Execute a trigger order. Permissionless — anyone can call (cranker incentive).

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint (needed for transfer_checked — validated against market)

instructions.name: freeze_perk_oracle
docs: Freeze or unfreeze a PerkOracle. Admin only.

instructions.name: initialize_perk_oracle
docs: Initialize a PerkOracle price feed. Permissionless — anyone can pay rent.
Oracle authority is inherited from Protocol.oracle_authority (set by admin).

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint to create oracle for (validated as real SPL or Token-2022 Mint)

instructions.name: initialize_position
docs: C12: Initialize a user position account. Must be called before deposit.

instructions.name: initialize_protocol
docs: Initialize the protocol singleton. Called once by admin.

accounts.name: protocol_fee_vault
docs: CPI transfers — fee claims use per-market vaults directly. Admin-only, one-time init.

instructions.name: liquidate
docs: Liquidate an underwater position. Permissionless.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint (needed for transfer_checked — validated against market)

instructions.name: open_position
docs: Open a leveraged position via vAMM.

instructions.name: place_trigger_order
docs: Place a trigger order (limit, stop-loss, take-profit).

instructions.name: propose_admin
docs: M5: Propose admin transfer (current admin only).

instructions.name: reclaim_empty_account
docs: Reclaim an empty position account. Permissionless.
Sweeps dust capital to insurance, closes account, returns rent.

accounts.name: rent_receiver
docs: M11 fix: Must be the position owner (not arbitrary caller) to prevent rent theft.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can call this

instructions.name: transfer_oracle_authority
docs: Transfer PerkOracle authority. Current authority only.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Signer must be either the current oracle authority or the protocol admin

instructions.name: update_amm
docs: Update AMM peg multiplier to re-anchor to oracle. Permissionless.

instructions.name: update_oracle_config
docs: Update PerkOracle config (price banding). Admin only.

instructions.name: update_perk_oracle
docs: Update a PerkOracle price feed. Authorized cranker only.

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Withdraw collateral from a market position.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint (needed for transfer_checked — validated against market)

errors.name: PositionFlipNotAllowed
errors.msg: Position flip not allowed — close first, then reopen

errors.name: PegCooldownNotElapsed
errors.msg: AMM peg update cooldown not elapsed

errors.name: InsuranceEpochCapExceeded
errors.msg: Insurance fund epoch payout cap exceeded

errors.name: DexPoolOracleNotSupported
errors.msg: DexPool oracle source not yet supported

errors.name: PositionNotInitialized
errors.msg: Position not initialized — call initialize_position first

errors.name: InsufficientOiForFunding
errors.msg: Insufficient OI on both sides for funding

errors.name: RemainingPositionTooSmall
errors.msg: Remaining position size below minimum after partial close

errors.name: TriggerOrderTooOld
errors.msg: Trigger order too old (exceeded max age)

errors.name: InvalidTokenDecimals
errors.msg: Token mint decimals out of supported range

errors.name: UnsupportedTokenExtension
errors.msg: Token-2022 extension not supported (e.g. transfer fees)

errors.name: TokenMintMismatch
errors.msg: Token mint does not match market

errors.name: PositionNotEmpty
errors.msg: Position is not empty — cannot reclaim

errors.name: PositionHasOpenOrders
errors.msg: Position has open trigger orders — cannot reclaim

errors.name: ReclaimFeeDebt
errors.msg: Account has outstanding fee debt — cannot reclaim

errors.name: ReclaimCollateralAboveDust
errors.msg: Account collateral above dust threshold — cannot reclaim

errors.name: AdminTransferPending
errors.msg: Admin transfer already pending — accept or cancel first

errors.name: MinHoldingPeriodNotMet
errors.msg: Must wait at least 1 slot before closing position

errors.name: OracleNotFrozen
errors.msg: Oracle must be frozen for this operation

errors.name: OracleUpdateTooFrequent
errors.msg: Oracle update too frequent (one per slot max)

errors.name: OracleGapTooLarge
errors.msg: Oracle gap too large — unfreeze required

errors.name: OracleFallbackFailed
errors.msg: Primary and fallback oracles both failed

errors.name: OracleCircuitBreakerTripped
errors.msg: Oracle circuit breaker tripped — price deviation from EMA exceeds threshold

fields.name: oracle_address
docs: New oracle address (None = keep current)

fields.name: active
docs: Set market active/inactive (None = keep current)

fields.name: trading_fee_bps
docs: New trading fee in BPS (None = keep current)

fields.name: max_leverage
docs: H4 (Pashov2): New max leverage (100x-scaled, e.g. 2000 = 20x). None = keep current.

fields.name: max_price_change_bps
docs: Max allowed price change per update in basis points. 0 = no banding (memecoins).
3000 = 30% max change per update (deep liquidity tokens).

fields.name: circuit_breaker_deviation_bps
docs: Circuit breaker: max deviation from EMA in bps. 0 = disabled.

fields.name: creator
docs: Immutable — part of PDA seed. Never modify after creation.

fields.name: last_oracle_price
docs: Last oracle price used in accrue_market_to (spec §5.4)

fields.name: last_market_slot
docs: Last slot used in accrue_market_to

fields.name: current_slot
docs: Current slot (updated on every touch)

fields.name: funding_rate_bps_per_slot_last
docs: Stored funding rate for anti-retroactivity (bps per slot, spec §5.5)

fields.name: funding_price_sample_last
docs: Funding price sample for anti-retroactivity

fields.name: insurance_floor
docs: Insurance floor (spec §4.7)

fields.name: stale_account_count_long
docs: Stale account counts per side (for ResetPending drain tracking)

fields.name: phantom_dust_bound_long_q
docs: Dynamic phantom dust bounds (spec §4.6, §5.7)

fields.name: insurance_fee_revenue
docs: Insurance fee revenue tracking

fields.name: max_price_change_bps
docs: New max price change per update in bps. 0 = no banding.

fields.name: min_sources
docs: Minimum number of sources required for oracle updates.

fields.name: max_staleness_seconds
docs: Maximum staleness in seconds before oracle is considered stale.

fields.name: circuit_breaker_deviation_bps
docs: Circuit breaker: max deviation from EMA in bps. 0 = disabled.
